command: Use @skill:chained-vulnerability-static-audit to perform a static-only chained vulnerability review of this codebase. Inspect only the current working directory. Do not use live probes, dynamic scanners, shell commands, or files outside this workspace. Write the final report with write_chained_vulnerability_report to docs/security/CHAINED_VULNERABILITIES_REVIEW.md.

tool_calls.arguments_summary:
{"content": "# Chained Vulnerability Static Review — Apex Airlines Booking System

**Project:** `app-07-airline-booking`
**Review Date:** 2026-05-24
**Methodology:** Static source-code audit (no dynamic probes, no live execution)
**Scope:** All Java files, Thymeleaf templates, JavaScript, CSS, application properties, and the Dockerfile in the workspace.

---

FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY pom.xml .
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline
COPY src ./src
RUN mvn package -DskipTests

FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8081
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

chains.chain_name: Sequential PNR Enumeration → Booking IDOR → Stored XSS on Staff View

unmatched_candidate_chain_titles: Chain 2: Unauthenticated SQL Injection via Flight Search
Chain 3: Exposed H2 Console → Database Compromise / Potential RCE
Chain 4: CSRF Disabled + Session Fixation → Cross-Origin Request Forgery
